digest.greeting: Monday, June 29, Jean. Today is anchored by Jean Midyear, the Shelley 1:1, EPMO Portfolio Review, and a short PM Feedback block, with David showing a COL holiday OOO marker. Outlook shows 7 working calendar blocks plus the all-day OOO marker, 2 carried-over items, 2 reminders due today, and 2 urgent open items. Keep the morning focused on turning KPI inputs into SMART goals, closing the LeadUp 2A knowledge check, using the noon focus block for portfolio/midyear prep, and handling the structure-change follow-ups with Camilo, Nicolas, Thiago, and Laura. Teams broad discovery was rate-limited and the later narrow search returned no useful recent hits, so this brief relies on Outlook, email, reminders, and GitHub-held continuity.

items.label: Turn the KPI set into SMART goals
items.detail: This remains the highest-value open thread going into Jean Midyear. Use the morning admin block or noon focus time to turn the KPI set into concrete SMART goals and be ready to discuss year-end rating expectations.

items.label: Complete the LeadUp Module 2A knowledge check
items.detail: The training closeout is still open behind the KPI and transition work. Clear it today if the noon focus block leaves room after midyear and portfolio prep.

items.label: Talk with Camilo about the structure change and MHE RFE support
items.detail: Scheduled for today. Use the conversation to make the July 1 structure change practical and clarify what support is needed for MHE RFE.

items.label: Schedule 1:1s with Nicolas, Thiago, and Laura
items.detail: New reminder from this morning. Tie the meetings to the structure-change rollout so each conversation has a clear purpose and next step.

sections.title: Today's Schedule
sections.note: Times shown in Jean's Outlook working timezone. The day has a front-loaded leadership-prep shape, a useful noon focus block, and a lighter afternoon after Portfolio Review.

items.label: David Molano has a COL holiday OOO marker
items.detail: Avoid placing CoE, Staff Augmentation, or dashboard dependencies on David today without confirming availability.

items.label: Approve Timecards & Prepare for the Week
items.detail: Best early slot for admin cleanup and for tightening the KPI SMART-goal notes before midyear.

items.label: Quick Amazon Connect/Agentforce Voice Debrief
items.detail: Nadia, Thiago, and Jean are on the calendar. Nadia also shared the LLF_CIO_Transition workbook this morning for awareness, so keep transition implications visible.

items.label: Jean Midyear
items.detail: Key preparation point for SMART KPI goals and any team-transition implications that affect expectations.

items.label: 1:1 Shelley & Jean
items.detail: The stated purpose is to understand department needs and how Jean can support them. Bring any portfolio or staffing signals that need Shelley context.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Most useful protected work window. Use it for KPI cleanup, LeadUp closeout, or EPMO Portfolio Review prep.

items.label: EPMO Portfolio Review
items.detail: Weekly project-request review and assignment forum. Watch for intake ownership, PM/PE assignment, rejection communication, and cross-org impact decisions.

items.label: PM Feedback
items.detail: Short feedback block with Sara, Eugenia, Stephanie Baily, and Jean. Keep any guidance clear enough to turn into next steps after the meeting.

items.label: Review the LLF_CIO_Transition workbook signal
items.detail: Nadia shared the workbook this morning with Jean, Javier, Jorge, and Thiago for awareness. Skim it before or after the Amazon Connect/Agentforce Voice debrief so transition implications do not get separated from today's structure-change conversations.

items.label: Prepare the EPMO Portfolio Review decision points
items.detail: Use the noon focus block to identify which project requests need intake ownership, PM or PE assignment, rejection communication, or cross-org impact review before the 2:00 PM portfolio meeting.

items.label: Capture PM Feedback next steps cleanly
items.detail: The 3:45 PM block is short and includes Sara, Eugenia, and Stephanie Baily. Leave with clear guidance, owner, and follow-up timing rather than a loose verbal takeaway.

items.label: David Molano has a COL holiday OOO marker
items.detail: Outlook shows David out across the day, so avoid assuming same-day response on CoE, Staff Augmentation, or dashboard-adjacent dependencies.

items.label: 1:1 Jhara & Jean
items.detail: Agenda is portfolio review, roadblocks, and next steps. Good place to keep Send Letters Queue and other active project blockers crisp.

items.label: Portfolio Review
items.detail: Jorge's broader portfolio review is set up to review Phase I, Phase II, and Court projects, watch items, owners, and follow-ups.

items.label: EPMO TL Weekly Catch Up
items.detail: Weekly touchpoint with Janet, Eugenia, Jorge, and Jean.

items.label: 1:1 Yuri & Jean
items.detail: Useful slot for IT-adjacent project follow-ups after the portfolio conversations.

items.label: CoE: Touchpoint
items.detail: Mar and Jean are on the calendar. Keep today's CIO transition and CoE dependency signals handy.

reminderHistory.text: Seguimiento a stakeholders de Co-counsel network project. Go/no-go?
Hacer follow up con HR para resultados de la survey
Responder al correo de Eugenia para Danny sobre problemas con Venn
Seguimiento a David para la creación del COE playbook
solicitar a TMs los numeros de sus tickets de IT relacionados a Venn
Preparar presentación para Reunión del Viernes sobre presentar EPMO
Seguimiento a Yuri - TRACE tasksets listos para UAT
Actualizar hoja de proyectos para Jorge (portafolio de Jill)
Hablar con Camilo: cambio de estructura y soporte para MHe RFE
Agendar 1:1 con Nicolás, Thiago y Laura
